calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Ann Hipshman, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Bruce Burge, Esq. for Plaintiff Henry Karnilowicz, also present.
Camille Williams and Lucille Traficante, Defendants present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a future judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:
226 -6th Street, San Francisco, CA.
Stipulation to Pay and Stay.
Defendants to pay Current rent in the amount of $550.00 by September 1, 2003 and $1,900.00 Back Rent in Installments of $100.00 payable on the fifth day of the month by 5PM and each month until fully paid for 19 months.
If the defendants default, Judgment will be put in writing, for Possession, Back rent and forfeiture of the rental agreement, with no stay or appeal of the judgment.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
